title: Roguelike Conquest
description: A Roguelike Conquest. Minecraft - for the Adventurer !
body:
![Roguelike Conquest Title in Pride or rainbow colours](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2cb7d2a58a4b3352c774edeb2909e6215f54f93.png)

[Official Discord for the Roguelike Conquest Server]([https://discord.gg/SpTj2sq9eu](https://discord.gg/N9ERCN4jz4))

Server is offline, join the disc to see our future works!
~~IF THE SERVER ISN'T LETTING YOU JOIN PLEASE TRY AGAIN OR JOIN THE DISCORD TO LET ME KNOW
~~
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/dd9MncVVTGs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Allocate at least 6GB of RAM**

_An accessible and feature rich RPG 1.20.1 fabric modpack geared towards adventurers with a highly curated mod selection and a Medieval theme._

> Dive into the adventurous realms of Auralia in Roguelike Conquest! Collect 12 out of 16 mystical Eyes by battling fierce monsters and exploring diverse biomes. Complete quests steeped in optional lore, slay the Ender Dragon, and then journey to other planets to face even more formidable end-game bosses. Adventure awaits in a world where every quest leads to glory!

## My goal with this modpack
To provide an immersive experience with endless content and give people a reason to play Minecraft again. With First-person Model you can experience Minecraft from Steve's real perspective.

Complete with a quest system.

Every aspect of gameplay has been well considered. There are no easy routes forward. Starting out, you need to navigate a dangerous world and somehow scrape through with your first Cobblemon - these little friends will protect you and fight mobs for you. 

The world is flooded with mobs that are too strong for you to handle and powerful Cobblemon who will attack you if you get too close. Your only choice is to run away and seek out human settlements to gear up.

You need to work to unlock features; no more stumbling upon high powered gear day 1 - with LevelZ you have a real RPG experience. 

Manage to survive long enough you can begin taking the fight to the world with the RPG Series Mods. Become an Archer, Paladin, Priest, Wizard, Rogue, Warrior or even a Death Knight. 

Or alternatively simply use any other gear.

Delve into the world of technology with Create and all its many addons.

There are so many transport options: 
- You can ride some Cobblemon, even fly or swim. 
- Valkyrien Skies, Eureka!, Clockwork
- Immersive Aircraft 

You'll need some of these to explore the expansive world and all its new structures, particularly the roguelike dungeons. 

Better gear up quickly, with RPGDifficulty mobs will get stronger as you do. The further away you get from spawn the harder fights will be and the quicker you will lose. 

Build a rocketship and visit the other planets with Ad Astra.
